- Terminal projection 不订阅/不写/不 kill/不 close。
- Projection 输出仅含数字/布尔/id/path/timestamp/ageMs，**不含** message content、tool args/result、systemPrompt 文本、Codex response id/error、terminal buffer 文本、diff/baseline 文本、Browser Share url/snapshot/payload。

- `npm run lint` — 通过，0 error / 0 warning。
- 未新增/修改 npm script；聚焦测试脚本（`scripts/test-memory-diagnostics.mjs` 与 `npm run test:memory-diagnostics`）按实施计划属于下一子任务 `memory-snapshot-api`，本次未实现。

## Notes / Risks

- `AgentSessionWrapper.projectDiagnostic` 使用 `inner.sessionManager.getEntries()`（shallow copy）。对超长单 session 已有 per-session branch entry / message / content-block caps + deadline 协作，但 `getEntries()` 会返回一份数组引用副本；这是 SessionManager 已加载内存的最小额外分配，未发现更便宜的只读迭代 API，符合“不深拷贝 content”边界。

- 依赖未变更；无新增运行时依赖（`@earendil-works/pi-ai/api/openai-codex-responses` 为既有 subpath export，已在 `lib/openai-codex-warmup.ts` 使用同款导入）。
- 未改动任何既有 API、JSONL、task、session、config 格式；新增 export 为 additive。"

### Implementation Complete

Subtask **memory-snapshot-api** is done. Snapshot orchestration, atomic persistence, the POST API, focused tests, and the `test:memory-diagnostics` script are all in place. Settings UI and docs are intentionally untouched (later subtasks).

#### Files Changed

- `lib/memory-diagnostics.ts` — **new**. Schema v1 contracts; `collectProcessDiagnostic` (process/V8/memory delta); `computeFindings` (pure, threshold-bound, never claims leak); async `collectRuntimeSections` with per-section error isolation and **dynamic** owner imports (keeps the module leaf-strip-safe and lets tests load it without parsing owner modules that use parameter properties); `buildSnapshot`; `compactSnapshot`/`serializeSnapshot` (5 MiB compact fallback → hard-cap failure); `writeSnapshotAtomic` (same-dir tmp+rename, best-effort 0700/0600, tmp cleanup on failure); async `captureMemorySnapshot(options?)` with injectable runtime collector; `triggerMemorySnapshot` with a process-global Promise single-flight guard (`globalThis.__piMemoryDiagnosticSnapshotInFlight`).
- `app/api/diagnostics/memory-snapshot/route.ts` — **new**. `runtime="nodejs"`, `dynamic="force-dynamic"`, POST-only, no params. `ok`→201, `snapshot_in_progress`→409, else→500; all responses `Cache-Control: no-store`; **metadata only** (`MemorySnapshotApiSuccess`), never the full snapshot.
- `scripts/test-memory-diagnostics.mjs` — **new**. Tests schema/structure, metadata-only response, env-secret marker exclusion, single-flight (one 201 / one 409 / third succeeds), `computeFindings` thresholds + no-leak wording, `compactSnapshot` purity, `serializeSnapshot` compact-success and hard-cap failure, `writeSnapshotAtomic` success/no-leftover-tmp and mkdir-failure, and `captureMemorySnapshot` dir-unavailable. Uses an injected `fakeRuntime` to stay independent of owner modules under Node native TS-strip.
- `package.json` — added `"test:memory-diagnostics"` script.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — appended subtask handoff record.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — 0 error / 0 warning
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass
- `npm run test:memory-diagnostics` — `memory-diagnostics tests: all passed`
- Real-default-collector smoke (raw node): writes a valid schema-v1 JSON; agentSessions/terminals fail under Node TS-strip (parameter properties) and are gracefully recorded as section errors with `partial=true`, proving error isolation. Next/SWC compiles those modules normally.

#### Notes / Risks

- The owner modules (rpc-manager, terminal-manager) use constructor parameter properties that the **Node native TS stripper** cannot parse. This is **not** a production issue — the Next dev/prod server compiles them with SWC. It only limits raw-`node` standalone smoke; manual verification must go through `curl -X POST http://localhost:30141/api/diagnostics/memory-snapshot` against the running server. Section error isolation already handles such failures gracefully (`partial=true`).
- Strictly read-only: no abort/destroy/cleanup/reset/GC/listAll/startRpc; no custom output path; no content/credentials returned. Additive only.
- Next subtask `memory-settings-ui` can consume `MemorySnapshotApiSuccess` (the POST returns 201/409/500 metadata) and implement the Settings Diagnostics section per `ui-prototype.html`. A manual smoke against `npm run dev` is recommended once the UI lands (and definitely before the validation/docs barrier subtask).

Subtask **memory-snapshot-api** is done. Snapshot orchestration, atomic persistence, the POST API, focused tests, and the `test:memory-diagnostics` script are all in place. Settings UI and docs are intentionally untouched (later subtasks).

#### Files Changed

- `lib/memory-diagnostics.ts` — **new**. Schema v1 contracts; `collectProcessDiagnostic` (process/V8/memory delta); `computeFindings` (pure, threshold-bound, never claims leak); async `collectRuntimeSections` with per-section error isolation and **dynamic** owner imports (keeps the module leaf-strip-safe and lets tests load it without parsing owner modules that use parameter properties); `buildSnapshot`; `compactSnapshot`/`serializeSnapshot` (5 MiB compact fallback → hard-cap failure); `writeSnapshotAtomic` (same-dir tmp+rename, best-effort 0700/0600, tmp cleanup on failure); async `captureMemorySnapshot(options?)` with injectable runtime collector; `triggerMemorySnapshot` with a process-global Promise single-flight guard (`globalThis.__piMemoryDiagnosticSnapshotInFlight`).
- `app/api/diagnostics/memory-snapshot/route.ts` — **new**. `runtime="nodejs"`, `dynamic="force-dynamic"`, POST-only, no params. `ok`→201, `snapshot_in_progress`→409, else→500; all responses `Cache-Control: no-store`; **metadata only** (`MemorySnapshotApiSuccess`), never the full snapshot.
- `scripts/test-memory-diagnostics.mjs` — **new**. Tests schema/structure, metadata-only response, env-secret marker exclusion, single-flight (one 201 / one 409 / third succeeds), `computeFindings` thresholds + no-leak wording, `compactSnapshot` purity, `serializeSnapshot` compact-success and hard-cap failure, `writeSnapshotAtomic` success/no-leftover-tmp and mkdir-failure, and `captureMemorySnapshot` dir-unavailable. Uses an injected `fakeRuntime` to stay independent of owner modules under Node native TS-strip.
- `package.json` — added `"test:memory-diagnostics"` script.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — appended subtask handoff record.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — 0 error / 0 warning
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass
- `npm run test:memory-diagnostics` — `memory-diagnostics tests: all passed`
- Real-default-collector smoke (raw node): writes a valid schema-v1 JSON; agentSessions/terminals fail under Node TS-strip (parameter properties) and are gracefully recorded as section errors with `partial=true`, proving error isolation. Next/SWC compiles those modules normally.

#### Notes / Risks

- The owner modules (rpc-manager, terminal-manager) use constructor parameter properties that the **Node native TS stripper** cannot parse. This is **not** a production issue — the Next dev/prod server compiles them with SWC. It only limits raw-`node` standalone smoke; manual verification must go through `curl -X POST http://localhost:30141/api/diagnostics/memory-snapshot` against the running server. Section error isolation already handles such failures gracefully (`partial=true`).
- Strictly read-only: no abort/destroy/cleanup/reset/GC/listAll/startRpc; no custom output path; no content/credentials returned. Additive only.
- Next subtask `memory-settings-ui` can consume `MemorySnapshotApiSuccess` (the POST returns 201/409/500 metadata) and implement the Settings Diagnostics section per `ui-prototype.html`. A manual smoke against `npm run dev` is recommended once the UI lands (and definitely before the validation/docs barrier subtask).

{
  "command": "cat >> .ypi/tasks/20260711-233128-新增内存诊断快照能力-采集进程-agentsession-studio运行时状态并写入诊断文件/handoff.md <<'EOF'

---

# handoff — 子任务 memory-snapshot-api (done)

实现快照编排、原子落盘与 `POST /api/diagnostics/memory-snapshot`，并加上 focused 测试与 `test:memory-diagnostics` 脚本。**未**实现 Settings UI 或文档（后续子任务）。

## Files Changed

- `lib/memory-diagnostics.ts` — **新增**。schema v1 编排与持久化入口：
  - 常量 `MEMORY_DIAGNOSTIC_KIND` / `MEMORY_DIAGNOSTIC_SCHEMA_VERSION=1` / `DEFAULT_DEADLINE_MS=5000` / `MAX_SNAPSHOT_JSON_BYTES=5MiB` / `DEFAULT_LIMITS`。
  - 类型：`ProcessDiagnostic` / `MemoryDiagnosticFinding` / `DiagnosticTruncation` / `MemoryDiagnosticSnapshotV1` / `MemorySnapshotApiSuccess` / `MemorySnapshotApiError` / `CaptureMemorySnapshotOptions`。
  - 纯函数：`collectProcessDiagnostic`（PID/PPID/Node/platform/arch/uptime、`process.memoryUsage` 前后 delta、`process.resourceUsage`、`node:v8` `getHeapStatistics` 数值字段）、`computeFindings`（纯函数，阈值与 design.md 一致：rss 1GiB warn / 2GiB critical、heap 768MiB、alive≥10、单 session ≥50MiB、listener≥10、child age≥30min、pending≥20 / attempts≥10、path cache≥max(500,alive×20)、terminals/browser≥50；措辞一律 “may warrant inspection”，不宣称泄漏）。
  - `collectRuntimeSections(budget, limits)`（**async**）：按 deadline 顺序调用 owner projection，**每 section try/catch 隔离**，失败只写 `errors[]` 不阻断其他 section。owner 模块（rpc-manager / studio / session-reader / browser-share / terminal / session-file-changes）以 **动态 `import()`** 引入，使 `lib/memory-diagnostics.ts` 仅静态依赖编译态 SDK 与 `node:v8`，保持 leaf-strip-safe，可被 focused 测试直接 import 而不强制 Node 原生 TS stripper 解析含 constructor parameter property 的 owner 模块。生产环境（Next/SWC）动态 import 命中已缓存热模块。
  - `buildSnapshot`：组合 process + sections + findings + privacy + limits + duration；`privacy.excludes` 明示不含正文/凭证，`sharingWarning` 提醒分享前审阅。
  - `compactSnapshot`（纯函数，返回新对象不 mutate）+ `serializeSnapshot`：首轮超 5MiB 去 samples 保留 totals 复试；仍超限返回 `{ok:false,code:"snapshot_too_large"}`。
  - `writeSnapshotAtomic`：`getAgentDir()/diagnostics`，文件名 `memory-<compactUtc>-pid<PID>-<8hex>.json`（无用户输入），同目录 tmp+`renameSync` 原子写，best-effort `chmod 0o700/0o600`，失败 finally `unlinkSync` 清理 tmp，绝不留半个正式文件。
  - `captureMemorySnapshot(options?)`（**async**）：编排 process → sections → build → serialize(含 compact fallback) → atomic write；接受可选 `collectRuntime` 注入（测试用），返回 `MemorySnapshotResult`。`partial` 由 deadline 过期 / section errors / process error 决定。
  - `triggerMemorySnapshot(options?)`：进程内单飞 guard（`globalThis.__piMemoryDiagnosticSnapshotInFlight` Promise）。已有进行中则立刻返回 `snapshot_in_progress`；capture 真 async（动态 import/注入均 yield），lock 在 `setInFlight` 后被跨请求观测，finally 释放。
- `app/api/diagnostics/memory-snapshot/route.ts` — **新增**。`export const runtime = "nodejs"`、`dynamic = "force-dynamic"`，`POST` 无 body 只调 `triggerMemorySnapshot()`：`ok`→201，`snapshot_in_progress`→409，其余→500；所有响应 `Cache-Control: no-store`；响应体仅 `MemorySnapshotApiSuccess` 元数据（filePath/fileName/bytes/durationMs/schemaVersion/partial/compacted/sectionSummary/errorCount/truncationCount），**永不返回完整 snapshot**。不接受任何路径/limit/开关参数。
- `scripts/test-memory-diagnostics.mjs` — **新增**。用 `ts-extension-loader` 运行的 mjs 测试（`async function main` IIFE），覆盖：1) 基本采集+schema+“响应仅元数据”断言；2) env secret marker / env 变量名不出现在文件或响应；3) 并发单飞：两 trigger → 一 ok 一 409，第三次成功；4) `computeFindings` 纯函数阈值与边界、不宣称泄漏；5) `compactSnapshot` 纯函数 + `serializeSnapshot` compact-success 与硬上限失败；6) `writeSnapshotAtomic` 成功无残留 tmp + mkdir 失败降级；7) `captureMemorySnapshot` 在 agent dir 不可写为目录时返回 `diagnostics_dir_unavailable`。运行时注入 `collectRuntime: fakeRuntime` 以避免在 Node 原生 stripper 下加载含 parameter property 的 owner 模块。
- `package.json` — 新增 `"test:memory-diagnostics": "node --loader ./scripts/ts-extension-loader.mjs --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON scripts/test-memory-diagnostics.mjs"`。

## 关键决策

- owner projection 改为 **动态 import**：避免 `lib/memory-diagnostics.ts` 在 Node 原生 TS strip 下因静态 import rpc-manager/terminal-manager 而失败；同时保持 collector 在生产可加载已缓存热模块。`rpc-manager` / `terminal-manager` 在裸 `node` strip 下报 `parameter property is not supported`，section error 隔离测试证明会被优雅降级；Next/SWC 编译态下正常。
- 测试对 `captureMemorySnapshot`/`triggerMemorySnapshot` 传入 `collectRuntime: fakeRuntime` 注入，专注验证编排/schema/size/原子写/单飞，不依赖加载 owner 私有容器。
- 单飞用 Promise guard + capture 真 async（动态 import 在生产 yield），并发 409 在测试中可验证；裸 node 下 capture 因 strip 失败仍能产出 partial 快照（证明 section 隔离）。
- `DiagnosticTruncation` 类型定义在 collector（snapshot schema 的一部分），不放进 leaf `memory-diagnostics-types.ts`。

## Verification

- `npm run lint` — 0 error / 0 warning。
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — 通过。
- `npm run test:memory-diagnostics` — `memory-diagnostics tests: all passed`。
- 真 default collector 端到端 smoke（裸 node）：写入合法 schema v1 JSON，section 隔离工作（agentSessions/terminals 在 strip 下报错被写入 errors，partial=true，其他 section 正常）。

## Notes / Risks

- 裸 `node` TS-strip 无法解析含 constructor parameter property 的 owner 模块；这**不是**生产问题——生产在 Next dev/prod 服务器内经 SWC 编译，路径已由 `app/api/.../route.ts` → `@/lib/memory-diagnostics` 与动态 import 正常解析。手工 smoke 必须在 `npm run dev` 起的服务内或用 `curl -X POST .../api/diagnostics/memory-snapshot` 验证。
- 下一子任务 `memory-settings-ui` 负责 Settings Diagnostics section + 五态 UI；其所需 API 契约为 `MemorySnapshotApiSuccess`（`triggerMemorySnapshot` 返回，POST 映射为 201/409/500）。
- 严格只读：未调用 abort/destroy/cleanup/reset/GC/listAll/startRpc；不接自定义路径；不返回正文/凭证。
- 未改既有 API、JSONL、task、session、config 格式；新增为 additive。
EOF
echo "handoff updated""
}

memory-snapshot-api.summary:
### Implementation Complete

Subtask **memory-snapshot-api** is done. Snapshot orchestration, atomic persistence, the POST API, focused tests, and the `test:memory-diagnostics` script are all in place. Settings UI and docs are intentionally untouched (later subtasks).

#### Files Changed

- `lib/memory-diagnostics.ts` — **new**. Schema v1 contracts; `collectProcessDiagnostic` (process/V8/memory delta); `computeFindings` (pure, threshold-bound, never claims leak); async `collectRuntimeSections` with per-section error isolation and **dynamic** owner imports (keeps the module leaf-strip-safe and lets tests load it without parsing owner modules that use parameter properties); `buildSnapshot`; `compactSnapshot`/`serializeSnapshot` (5 MiB compact fallback → hard-cap failure); `writeSnapshotAtomic` (same-dir tmp+rename, best-effort 0700/0600, tmp cleanup on failure); async `captureMemorySnapshot(options?)` with injectable runtime collector; `triggerMemorySnapshot` with a process-global Promise single-flight guard (`globalThis.__piMemoryDiagnosticSnapshotInFlight`).
- `app/api/diagnostics/memory-snapshot/route.ts` — **new**. `runtime="nodejs"`, `dynamic="force-dynamic"`, POST-only, no params. `ok`→201, `snapshot_in_progress`→409, else→500; all responses `Cache-Control: no-store`; **metadata only** (`MemorySnapshotApiSuccess`), never the full snapshot.
- `scripts/test-memory-diagnostics.mjs` — **new**. Tests schema/structure, metadata-only response, env-secret marker exclusion, single-flight (one 201 / one 409 / third succeeds), `computeFindings` thresholds + no-leak wording, `compactSnapshot` purity, `serializeSnapshot` compact-success and hard-cap failure, `writeSnapshotAtomic` success/no-leftover-tmp and mkdir-failure, and `captureMemorySnapshot` dir-unavailable. Uses an injected `fakeRuntime` to stay independent of owner modules under Node native TS-strip.
- `package.json` — added `"test:memory-diagnostics"` script.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — appended subtask handoff record.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — 0 error / 0 warning
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass
- `npm run test:memory-diagnostics` — `memory-diagnostics tests: all passed`
- Real-default-collector smoke (raw node): writes a valid schema-v1 JSON; agentSessions/terminals fail under Node TS-strip (parameter properties) and are gracefully recorded as section errors with `partial=true`, proving error isolation. Next/SWC compiles those modules normally.

#### Notes / Risks

- The owner modules (rpc-manager, terminal-manager) use constructor parameter properties that the **Node native TS stripper** cannot parse. This is **not** a production issue — the Next dev/prod server compiles them with SWC. It only limits raw-`node` standalone smoke; manual verification must go through `curl -X POST http://localhost:30141/api/diagnostics/memory-snapshot` against the running server. Section error isolation already handles such failures gracefully (`partial=true`).
- Strictly read-only: no abort/destroy/cleanup/reset/GC/listAll/startRpc; no custom output path; no content/credentials returned. Additive only.
- Next subtask `memory-settings-ui` can consume `MemorySnapshotApiSuccess` (the POST returns 201/409/500 metadata) and implement the Settings Diagnostics section per `ui-prototype.html`. A manual smoke against `npm run dev` is recommended once the UI lands (and definitely before the validation/docs barrier subtask).
